creator: yom@iaelu.net
text:
Hello,

It seems that security/cyrus-sasl2 and security/cyrus-sasl2-gssapi have got a dependency loop. I'm trying to build cyrus-sasl2 with GSSAPI support in poudriere, and these message are what I'm getting when starting the bulk:


[00:00:04] ====>> Cleaning the build queue
[00:00:04] ====>> Error: Dependency loop detected:
These packages depend on each other: cyrus-sasl-gssapi-2.1.26_7 cyrus-sasl-2.1.26_12


I haven't got more informations than this.

Here are my options for the cyrus-sasl2 package:

# cat /usr/local/etc/poudriere.d/mail-options/security_cyrus-sasl2/options
# This file is auto-generated by 'make config'.
# Options for cyrus-sasl-2.1.26_12
_OPTIONS_READ=cyrus-sasl-2.1.26_12
_FILE_COMPLETE_OPTIONS_LIST=ALWAYSTRUE AUTHDAEMOND DOCS KEEP_DB_OPEN  OBSOLETE_CRAM_ATTR SASLAUTHD BDB MYSQL PGSQL SQLITE2 SQLITE3 CRAM DIGEST GSSAPI LOGIN NTLM OTP PLAIN SCRAM SRP
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=ALWAYSTRUE
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=AUTHDAEMOND
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=DOCS
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=KEEP_DB_OPEN
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=OBSOLETE_CRAM_ATTR
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=SASLAUTHD
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=BDB
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=MYSQL
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=PGSQL
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=SQLITE2
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=SQLITE3
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=CRAM
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=DIGEST
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=GSSAPI
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=LOGIN
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=NTLM
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=OTP
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=PLAIN
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=SCRAM
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=SRP
